# Tech Stack/Technologies

This project is a SvelteKit application, using the latest versions of both Svelte and SvelteKit.

# Project Description

This project is a web application that allows you to generate a furry drivers license. It generates an image that looks like a license but features different fields than a generic license, an image of the users fursona instead of a headshot, and a custom background/icon on the license. Here are some additional details about the project:

- Users will be able to sign their name using a signature library and it will add the signature to the license as an svg
- Once the user fills out all required input fields, the application will generate an image for the user featuring their input data, their input image, and their signature
  - The image should always be the same shape and size regardless of the users screen resolution
- There should be some kind of sharing functionality
